summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/01/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 2.03%. the quotation in the morning was decreased by10-20 yuan/mt over yesterday. part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak; steel mills purchased on demand.
